headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com/gsi/client; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://accounts.google.com/gsi/style; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: http:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ws: wss: https://accounts.google.com https://oauth2.googleapis.com; frame-src https://accounts.google.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
